hero.title: Home Inventory Manager
hero.description: Create a private household inventory for belongings, rooms, values, warranties, and archive status.
points: Category, room, condition, warranty, and archive tracking
Inventory insights without ecommerce, insurance, barcode, or AI scope

flow.title: Items → Inventory → Insights
steps: Add household belongings with category, room, condition, value, and warranty details
Search, filter, edit, archive, restore, and delete owner-scoped item records
Review category, room, condition, warranty, recent, and highest-value summaries

differences.title: A lightweight household inventory, not a business system
differences.description: Home Inventory Manager keeps personal belongings organized without becoming ecommerce, ERP, warehouse management, accounting, insurance, barcode infrastructure, AI inventory, or smart-home integration.

items.title: Items
items.description: Record household belongings with practical metadata such as room, category, condition, quantity, value, warranty date, and notes.

items.title: Inventory
items.description: Keep the active list searchable, filterable, and easy to review while archiving records that no longer need regular attention.

items.title: Insights
items.description: See totals, estimated value, warranty attention, category distribution, room distribution, and high-value items.

feel.title: A calm register for household belongings
feel.description: The workspace is designed for quick entry, easy review, and private ownership inside the Ansiversa shell.

items.title: Fast to update
items.description: Drawer-based create and edit flows keep item maintenance direct.

items.title: Easy to scan
items.description: Filters and summary cards keep active, archived, warranty, room, and category views clear.

items.title: Bounded by design
items.description: No images, receipts, barcode scanning, insurance claims, valuation automation, or AI workflows are included in V1.

audiences.title: Who uses Home Inventory Manager
audiences.description: Home Inventory Manager is useful for people who want a private record of household belongings inside Ansiversa.

items.title: Homeowners and renters
items.description: Track appliances, furniture, electronics, tools, and other belongings by room and category.

items.title: Families
items.description: Keep shared household items organized without turning the workflow into a business inventory system.

items.title: Practical planners
items.description: Review warranties, values, conditions, and archive status when decluttering, moving, or maintaining the home.

resourceSection.title: Home Inventory Manager essentials
resourceSection.description: A focused app for personal belongings, not external inventory operations.

items.title: Item records
items.description: Track title, category, room, quantity, purchase details, estimated value, warranty date, brand, model, serial number, condition, and notes.

items.title: Category control
items.description: Create and rename categories while preventing deletion when items still exist.

items.title: Inventory review
items.description: Use search, filters, archive/restore, and insights to keep the list manageable.

groupedSection.title: A simple household inventory flow
groupedSection.description: The app stays centered on personal organization and review.

items.name: Items
items.description: Create owner-scoped records for household belongings.

items.name: Filters
items.description: Review by category, room, condition, warranty state, and archive state.

items.name: Insights
items.description: Summarize inventory counts, value, warranty attention, and distribution patterns.

technicalSection.title: Aligned with the Ansiversa platform model
technicalSection.description: Home Inventory Manager follows the shared mini-app routing, protected workflow, overview metadata, and owner-scoped API patterns.
items: Owner-scoped API records and isolated database tables.
Responsive workflow inside the shared Ansiversa shell.

finalCta.title: Open Home Inventory Manager
finalCta.description: Explore the private household inventory workflow.
